reforms.description: The Economic and Fiscal Statement presented in November 1984 outlined a new federal economic strategy aimed at reducing the budget deficit and promoting growth through expenditure cuts and cost recovery, while the Innovations programme within the Canadian Jobs Strategy encourages new ideas, experimentation, and pilot projects related to labor market concerns, with no rigid eligibility requirements.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The strategy aims to promote growth and innovation through new ideas and experimentation, which can enhance productivity and economic performance.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms were implemented as part of the Canadian Jobs Strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant structural change in the federal economic strategy and innovation support.
reforms.source_quote: This programme is designed to encourage new ideas, experimentation, innovation, and pilot projects directly related to labour market concerns.

reforms.description: The Canadian Jobs Strategy (CJS) was introduced to upgrade labor force skills and assist individuals in adapting to technical changes and international competition, replacing existing training and job creation programs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By upgrading labor force skills, the strategy enhances human capital, which is essential for innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The CJS was implemented to replace existing training and job creation programs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The CJS represents a major reform in labor market policy aimed at improving skills and adaptability.
reforms.source_quote: The primary objective of the Strategy, which replaces existing training and job creation programs, is to upgrade labour force skills and to assist individuals to adapt to requirements imposed by technical change and international competition.

reforms.description: The May budget provided enriched incentives for research and development to stimulate business fixed investment, particularly risk capital for small and medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By stimulating business investment in R&D, the incentives are expected to enhance innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The budget measures were implemented to enhance R&D incentives.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform provides significant but narrower incentives for R&D investment.
reforms.source_quote: Enriched incentives for research and development were provided in the May budget.
